_doc: === TAXONOMY ENTRY: Custom classification values (only non-builtin entries) ===
_category: Which taxonomy category. Built-in categories: 'genre', 'content_type'. Can also be any custom category string.
_value: REQUIRED. Slug value. Must not shadow a builtin value.
label: Intelligence Report
description: Classified or declassified intelligence analysis product
_description: OPTIONAL. Explanation of what this category value means.
_is_builtin: Always false in archives. Builtin entries are defined in Tensa's code and cannot be imported.
